mapper.select: SELECT usr.CO_ID, usr.USR_ID, usr.USR_NM, usr.USR_EML, usr.USE_FLG, usr.ROLE_ID, usr.CO_ID || '::' || USR_ID AS USERNAME, usr.USR_PWD AS PASSWORD, com.TM_ZN AS CO_TMZ, usr.LANG_VAL AS LANG_VAL, usr.SYS_MOD_VAL AS SYS_MOD_VAL, usr.DT_FMT_VAL AS DT_FMT_VAL, usr.SYS_COLR_VAL AS SYS_COLR_VAL FROM ADM_USR usr JOIN ADM_ROLE role ON ( usr.CO_ID = role.CO_ID AND usr.ROLE_ID = role.ROLE_ID ) JOIN ADM_CO com ON ( usr.CO_ID = com.CO_ID ) WHERE usr.CO_ID || '::' || usr.USR_ID = #{username}
SELECT CO_ID FROM ADM_CO WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND USE_FLG = 'Y'
SELECT USR_ID FROM ADM_USR WHERE CO_ID || '::' || USR_ID = #{username} AND USE_FLG = 'Y'

SELECT ROLE.CO_ID, ROLE.ROLE_ID, ROLE.ROLE_CD, ROLE.ROLE_NM, ROLE.ROLE_DESC, ROLE.USE_FLG, ROLE.CRE_DT, ROLE.CRE_USR_ID, ROLE.UPD_DT, ROLE.UPD_USR_ID FROM ADM_ROLE ROLE WHERE 1=1 AND ROLE.CO_ID = #{coId} AND ROLE.ROLE_ID = #{roleId} AND ROLE.USE_FLG = 'Y' LIMIT 1

SELECT AUTH.CO_ID, AUTH.ROLE_ID, ROLE.ROLE_CD, PERM.PERM_ID, PERM.PERM_CD, PGM.PGM_ID, PGM.PGM_CD, PGM.PGM_TP_CD, AUTH.USE_FLG AS ACTIVE_YN FROM ADM_ROLE_AUTH AUTH LEFT JOIN ADM_ROLE ROLE ON (AUTH.CO_ID = ROLE.CO_ID AND AUTH.ROLE_ID = ROLE.ROLE_ID) LEFT JOIN COM_PGM PGM ON (AUTH.CO_ID = PGM.CO_ID AND AUTH.PGM_ID = PGM.PGM_ID) LEFT JOIN COM_PERM PERM ON (AUTH.CO_ID = PERM.CO_ID AND AUTH.PERM_ID = PERM.PERM_ID) WHERE 1=1 AND AUTH.CO_ID = #{coId} AND AUTH.ROLE_ID = #{roleId} AND ROLE.USE_FLG = 'Y'
